question:
Wumpuses are dull. Wumpuses are rompuses. Every rompus is not cold. Rompuses are dumpuses. Dumpuses are feisty. Dumpuses are numpuses. Numpuses are mean. Numpuses are zumpuses. Every zumpus is not earthy. Every zumpus is a tumpus. Every tumpus is opaque. Impuses are liquid. Tumpuses are vumpuses. Every vumpus is not liquid. Vumpuses are jompuses. Each jompus is not spicy. Jompuses are yumpuses. Wren is a dumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Wren is liquid.
